EventLog.message: 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights vs 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers @ Atlantic Avenue
🚦 Toronto Northern Lights Sam Ndlovu vs. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers Silver Stanton

1. C Ricki Ohtani
2. CF Natalia Daly
3. SS Asher Hoekstra
4. 3B Lizzie Kent
5. 2B Laura Carew
6. LF Holly Cepeda
7. DH Vicki Hidalgo
8. RF U. Fairchild
9. 1B Bert Đorđević

1. 1B Derek Krause
2. SS Guillermo Allison
3. DH Wesley Ashley
4. LF Ki-Hoon Szymański
5. 2B Piper Kono
6. RF Madison Salmon
7. 3B Anastasia Robertson
8. CF Sheila Santana
9. C Rina Fan
Start of the top of the 1st. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Now batting: Ricki Ohtani (1st PA of game)
Ricki Ohtani hits a fly ball to center field.
Ricki Ohtani flies out to CF Sheila Santana.
Now batting: Natalia Daly (1st PA of game)
Natalia Daly hits a line drive to third base.
Natalia Daly lines out to 3B Anastasia Robertson.
Now batting: Asher Hoekstra (1st PA of game)
Asher Hoekstra hits a fly ball to center field.
Asher Hoekstra flies out to CF Sheila Santana.
End of the top of the 1st.
Start of the bottom of the 1st. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Derek Krause (1st PA of game)
Now batting: Guillermo Allison (1st PA of game)
Guillermo Allison hits a line drive to left field.
Guillermo Allison singles on a line drive to LF Holly Cepeda.
Now batting: Wesley Ashley (1st PA of game)
Wesley Ashley hits a ground ball to the shortstop.
Wesley Ashley grounds into a double play, SS Asher Hoekstra to 2B Laura Carew to 1B Bert Đorđević. Guillermo Allison out at second base. Wesley Ashley out at first base.
End of the bottom of the 1st.
Start of the top of the 2nd. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Now batting: Lizzie Kent (1st PA of game)
Lizzie Kent hits a ground ball to second base.
Lizzie Kent grounds out, 2B Piper Kono to 1B Derek Krause.
Now batting: Laura Carew (1st PA of game)
Laura Carew hits a line drive to right field.
Laura Carew singles on a line drive to RF Madison Salmon.
Now batting: Holly Cepeda (1st PA of game)
Holly Cepeda is hit by the pitch and advances to first base. Laura Carew to second base. 📣 The fans thunder their approval!
Now batting: Vicki Hidalgo (1st PA of game)
Vicki Hidalgo hits a ground ball to second base.
Vicki Hidalgo singles on a ground ball to 2B Piper Kono. Laura Carew to third base. Holly Cepeda to second base.
Now batting: U. Fairchild (1st PA of game)
U. Fairchild hits a line drive to left field.
U. Fairchild singles on a line drive to LF Ki-Hoon Szymański. Laura Carew scores! Holly Cepeda scores! Vicki Hidalgo to third base.
Now batting: Bert Đorđević (1st PA of game)
Bert Đorđević hits a fly ball to the shortstop.
Bert Đorđević flies out on a sacrifice fly to SS Guillermo Allison. Vicki Hidalgo scores! U. Fairchild to second base.
Now batting: Ricki Ohtani (0 for 1, 1 FO)
Ball. 1-2. 📣 The ballpark is in an uproar!
End of the top of the 2nd.
Start of the bottom of the 2nd. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Ki-Hoon Szymański (1st PA of game)
Ki-Hoon Szymański hits a ground ball to first base.
Ki-Hoon Szymański grounds out to 1B Bert Đorđević.
Now batting: Piper Kono (1st PA of game)
Now batting: Madison Salmon (1st PA of game)
Madison Salmon hits a ground ball to third base.
Madison Salmon grounds out, 3B Lizzie Kent to 1B Bert Đorđević.
End of the bottom of the 2nd.
Start of the top of the 3rd. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Now batting: Natalia Daly (0 for 1, 1 LO)
Natalia Daly hits a popup to first base.
Natalia Daly pops out to 1B Derek Krause.
Now batting: Asher Hoekstra (0 for 1, 1 FO)
Now batting: Lizzie Kent (0 for 1, 1 GO)
Laura Carew hits a popup to third base.
Laura Carew pops out to 3B Anastasia Robertson.
End of the top of the 3rd.
Start of the bottom of the 3rd. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Anastasia Robertson (1st PA of game)
Now batting: Sheila Santana (1st PA of game)
Sheila Santana hits a ground ball to the shortstop.
Sheila Santana grounds into a force out, SS Asher Hoekstra unassisted. Anastasia Robertson out at second.
Now batting: Rina Fan (1st PA of game)
Rina Fan hits a fly ball to center field.
Rina Fan doubles on a fly ball to CF Natalia Daly. Sheila Santana to third base.
Now batting: Derek Krause (0 for 1, 1 SO)
Ball. 3-1. 📣 Cheers roll through the stadium!
Now batting: Wesley Ashley (0 for 1, 1 GIDP, 1 GO)
Strike, swinging. 2-2. 📣 Chants rise from the bleachers!
Ball 4. Wesley Ashley walks. Sheila Santana scores! Rina Fan to third base. Guillermo Allison to second base.
Now batting: Ki-Hoon Szymański (0 for 1, 1 GO)
Ki-Hoon Szymański hits a fly ball to center field.
Ki-Hoon Szymański flies out to CF Natalia Daly.
End of the bottom of the 3rd.
Start of the top of the 4th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Holly Cepeda hits a ground ball to the shortstop.
Holly Cepeda grounds out, SS Guillermo Allison to 1B Derek Krause.
Vicki Hidalgo hits a ground ball to second base.
Vicki Hidalgo grounds out, 2B Piper Kono to 1B Derek Krause.
End of the top of the 4th.
Start of the bottom of the 4th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Piper Kono (0 for 1, 1 SO)
Piper Kono hits a fly ball to center field.
Piper Kono flies out to CF Natalia Daly.
Now batting: Madison Salmon (0 for 1, 1 GO)
Madison Salmon hits a fly ball to right field.
Madison Salmon flies out to RF U. Fairchild.
Anastasia Robertson hits a ground ball to the shortstop.
Anastasia Robertson grounds out, SS Asher Hoekstra to 1B Bert Đorđević.
End of the bottom of the 4th.
Start of the top of the 5th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Now batting: Ricki Ohtani (0 for 2, 1 FO, 1 SO)
Ricki Ohtani hits a ground ball to first base.
Ricki Ohtani singles on a ground ball to 1B Derek Krause. Bert Đorđević to third base.
Now batting: Natalia Daly (0 for 2, 1 LO, 1 PO)
Strike, swinging. 1-2. Ricki Ohtani steals second base! 📣 The stands explode in noise!
Natalia Daly hits a fly ball to center field.
Natalia Daly homers on a fly ball to center field! Bert Đorđević scores! Ricki Ohtani scores!
Now batting: Asher Hoekstra (0 for 2, 1 FO, 1 SO)
Asher Hoekstra hits a fly ball to left field.
Asher Hoekstra flies out to LF Ki-Hoon Szymański.
Now batting: Lizzie Kent (0 for 1, 1 GO, 1 BB)
Lizzie Kent hits a fly ball to right field.
Lizzie Kent flies out to RF Madison Salmon.
Now batting: Laura Carew (1 for 2, 1 1B, 1 PO)
End of the top of the 5th.
Start of the bottom of the 5th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Sheila Santana (0 for 1, 1 F)
Sheila Santana hits a ground ball to the shortstop.
Sheila Santana grounds out, SS Asher Hoekstra to 1B Bert Đorđević.
Rina Fan hits a ground ball to first base.
Rina Fan grounds out to 1B Bert Đorđević.
Now batting: Derek Krause (0 for 2, 2 SO)
Now batting: Guillermo Allison (1 for 1, 1 1B, 1 BB)
End of the bottom of the 5th.
Start of the top of the 6th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Silver Stanton pitching.
Now batting: Holly Cepeda (0 for 1, 1 HBP, 1 GO)
Now batting: Vicki Hidalgo (1 for 2, 1 1B, 1 GO)
Now batting: U. Fairchild (1 for 2, 1 1B, 1 SO)
Now batting: Bert Đorđević (1 SF, 1 BB)
Bert Đorđević is hit by the pitch and advances to first base. Vicki Hidalgo to second base.
The 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers manager is making a mound visit.
SP3 Silver Stanton is leaving the game. 🛴 RP2 Mordecai Kováčová takes the mound.
Now batting: Ricki Ohtani (1 for 3, 1 FO, 1 SO, 1 1B)
Ricki Ohtani hits a ground ball to second base.
Ricki Ohtani grounds into a force out, 2B Piper Kono to 3B Anastasia Robertson. Vicki Hidalgo out at third.
End of the top of the 6th.
Start of the bottom of the 6th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Wesley Ashley (0 for 1, 1 GIDP, 1 GO, 1 BB)
Now batting: Ki-Hoon Szymański (0 for 2, 1 GO, 1 FO)
Now batting: Piper Kono (0 for 2, 1 SO, 1 FO)
Piper Kono hits a line drive to left field.
Piper Kono lines out to LF Holly Cepeda.
End of the bottom of the 6th.
Start of the top of the 7th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Mordecai Kováčová pitching.
Now batting: Natalia Daly (1 for 3, 1 LO, 1 PO, 1 HR)
Now batting: Asher Hoekstra (0 for 3, 2 FO, 1 SO)
Ball. 1-0. Natalia Daly is caught stealing second base.
Now batting: Lizzie Kent (0 for 2, 1 GO, 1 BB, 1 FO)
Ball 4. Lizzie Kent walks. Asher Hoekstra to second base.
Now batting: Laura Carew (1 for 3, 1 1B, 1 PO, 1 SO)
Laura Carew hits a line drive to third base.
Laura Carew lines out to 3B Anastasia Robertson.
Now batting: Holly Cepeda (0 for 2, 1 HBP, 1 GO, 1 SO)
Holly Cepeda hits a fly ball to right field.
Holly Cepeda flies out to RF Madison Salmon.
End of the top of the 7th.
Start of the bottom of the 7th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Madison Salmon (0 for 2, 1 GO, 1 FO)
Madison Salmon hits a line drive to left field.
Madison Salmon singles on a line drive to LF Holly Cepeda.
Now batting: Anastasia Robertson (0 for 1, 1 BB, 1 GO)
Anastasia Robertson hits a line drive to center field.
Anastasia Robertson lines out to CF Natalia Daly.
Now batting: Sheila Santana (0 for 2, 1 F, 1 GO)
Sheila Santana hits a ground ball to third base.
Sheila Santana grounds into a double play, 3B Lizzie Kent to SS Asher Hoekstra to 1B Bert Đorđević. Madison Salmon out at second base. Sheila Santana out at first base.
End of the bottom of the 7th.
Start of the top of the 8th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Mordecai Kováčová pitching.
Now batting: Vicki Hidalgo (1 for 2, 1 1B, 1 GO, 1 BB)
Now batting: U. Fairchild (1 for 3, 1 1B, 2 SO)
U. Fairchild hits a fly ball to left field.
U. Fairchild flies out to LF Ki-Hoon Szymański.
Now batting: Bert Đorđević (1 SF, 1 BB, 1 HBP)
Bert Đorđević hits a fly ball to center field.
Bert Đorđević flies out to CF Sheila Santana.
End of the top of the 8th.
Start of the bottom of the 8th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Rina Fan (1 for 2, 1 2B, 1 GO)
Rina Fan hits a line drive to left field.
Rina Fan singles on a line drive to LF Holly Cepeda.
Now batting: Derek Krause (0 for 2, 2 SO, 1 BB)
Now batting: Guillermo Allison (1 for 2, 1 1B, 1 BB, 1 SO)
Guillermo Allison is hit by the pitch and advances to first base. Rina Fan to second base. 📣 You can barely hear the announcer!
The 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights manager is making a mound visit.
SP3 Sam Ndlovu remains in the game.
Now batting: Wesley Ashley (0 for 2, 1 GIDP, 1 GO, 1 BB, 1 SO)
Wesley Ashley hits a ground ball to third base.
Wesley Ashley grounds out, 3B Lizzie Kent to 1B Bert Đorđević. Rina Fan to third base. Guillermo Allison to second base.
Now batting: Ki-Hoon Szymański (0 for 3, 1 GO, 1 FO, 1 SO)
Ki-Hoon Szymański hits a fly ball to center field.
Ki-Hoon Szymański flies out to CF Natalia Daly.
End of the bottom of the 8th.
Start of the top of the 9th. 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights batting. 🛴 Mordecai Kováčová pitching.
Now batting: Ricki Ohtani (1 for 4, 1 FO, 1 SO, 1 1B, 1 F)
Ricki Ohtani hits a fly ball to left field.
Ricki Ohtani flies out to LF Ki-Hoon Szymański.
Now batting: Natalia Daly (1 for 3, 1 LO, 1 PO, 1 HR, 1 BB)
Foul tip. Natalia Daly strikes out swinging.
Now batting: Asher Hoekstra (0 for 3, 2 FO, 1 SO, 1 BB)
Now batting: Lizzie Kent (0 for 2, 1 GO, 2 BB, 1 FO)
Ball. 2-1. Asher Hoekstra steals second base!
Lizzie Kent hits a line drive to right field.
Lizzie Kent doubles on a line drive to RF Madison Salmon. Asher Hoekstra scores!
The 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers manager is making a mound visit.
RP2 Mordecai Kováčová remains in the game.
Now batting: Laura Carew (1 for 4, 1 1B, 1 PO, 1 SO, 1 LO)
Laura Carew hits a ground ball to third base.
Laura Carew grounds out, 3B Anastasia Robertson to 1B Derek Krause.
End of the top of the 9th.
Start of the bottom of the 9th. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers batting. 🚦 Sam Ndlovu pitching.
Now batting: Piper Kono (0 for 3, 1 SO, 1 FO, 1 LO)
Now batting: Madison Salmon (1 for 3, 1 GO, 1 FO, 1 1B)
Madison Salmon hits a fly ball to right field.
Madison Salmon flies out to RF U. Fairchild.
Now batting: Anastasia Robertson (0 for 2, 1 BB, 1 GO, 1 LO)
Ball. 2-0. Piper Kono steals second base!
Ball. 3-1. 📣 The crowd lets out a collective howl!
The 🚦 Toronto Northern Lights manager is making a pitching change.
SP3 Sam Ndlovu is leaving the game. 🚦 RP2 Lim Donahue takes the mound.
Now batting: Sheila Santana (0 for 3, 1 F, 2 GO, 1 GIDP)
Sheila Santana hits a fly ball to center field.
Sheila Santana flies out to CF Natalia Daly.
Now batting: Rina Fan (2 for 3, 1 2B, 1 GO, 1 1B)
Rina Fan hits a ground ball to second base. 📣 The place is rocking!
Rina Fan grounds out, 2B Laura Carew to 1B Bert Đorđević.
End of the bottom of the 9th.

🚦 Toronto Northern Lights Yahoo von Cheesehandzer equips 🧿 Altruistic Slugger's Charm of Calm from Shipment. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers Liliana Jo equips 👕 Mighty T-Shirt of the Artisan from Shipment. 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers Darren Rockford equips 🥋 Consistent Slugger's Jersey of the Gale from Shipment.
🚦 Toronto Northern Lights defeated 🛴 Brooklyn Scooter Dodgers. Final score: 7-1
